title: ScheduleIntentOutput
description:
Schema for the JSON object returned by `prompts/schedule_intent_prompt.md`. Mirrors `ScheduleIntentOutput` / `ScheduleIntentSchedule` / `ScheduleIntentTask` in `crates/clawd/src/runtime/types.rs`, and is enforced by `schedule_intent_schema_drift` in `crates/clawd/src/schedule_service.rs`.

This parser turns natural-language scheduling requests into a normalized schedule envelope. `task.payload` remains intentionally free-form because per-skill argument shape is validated by the skill registry/runtime, not by the schedule parser schema.

payload.description: Free-form task payload. For `run_skill`, runtime later validates `skill_name` and `args` against the live registry.

mode.description: Execution mode. execute allows the schedule service to persist changes; compile_only/dry_run means return a structured preview only and do not mutate scheduled_jobs.
